problem id: 474af332
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  10011110 -> 11100000
  00101110 -> 01100000
  00010011 -> 00010000
  11100101 -> 00000000
  00101010 -> 00000000
  11110111 -> 00110000
  00010001 -> 00000000
  00011001 -> 10000000
  10011000 -> 10000000

query: 11111001
predicted answer: 10000000
